full_text:
Plan for sample S111 culturing,

Wednesday 06.10.2021

Cell count:

total: 12.6 E6

live: 2.81 E6

viability: 22.4 % NOTE! very hard to focus - we used total cell count

size: 6.9 um

Total cell count: 14.36 e6 / ml

! Pre-coat all the wells with omentum-gel:

15 uL for 48-well plates. NOTE! Both 15 and 10 uL were tested, and 15 uL was too much. Use 10 uL.

A) RNA/DNA extraction:

48-well plate

DNA/RNA: 30 wells x 40 µl x = 1200 µl

2000 cells/µl = 2.40E6 cells

→ make 2 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 600 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension: 84 µl

cells in medium → 451.8 µl

ome-gel → 84.6 µl

aprotinin → 1.8 µl

thrombin → 1.8 µl

fibrinogen → 12 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 350 uL medium

B) Organoids for flow + FFPE sample (4 drops):

48-well plate

6 + 4 wells = 10 wells

10 wells x 40 µl = 400 µl,

2000 cells/µl = 0.80E6 cells

→ make 1 x 1.5 ml eppendorf

volume to take from cell suspension: 56 µl

cells in medium → 277.2 µl

ome-gel → 56.4 µl

aprotinin → 1.2 µl

thrombin → 1.2 µl

fibrinogen → 8 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 350 uL medium

Sample ID: S111_pAdnR1

total: 16.1 E6

live: 1.68 E6

viability: 10.4 %

size: 6.6 um

C) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Collect 3.0E6 cells per 900 uL flow staining buffer → 210 µl

D) Sample for cryo

→ Collect 2.28 e7 cells per 1 mL stemcell banker

→ 2x ORG, 2x SC, 2x IF

Omegel for the coating:

40 wells x 15 uL = 600 uL

medium → 499.8 µl

ome-gel → 84.6 µl

aprotinin → 1.8 µl

thrombin → 1.8 µl

fibrinogen → 12 µl

Prepare:

Medium

needed 350 uL x 40 = 14.0 mL

make 16 mL

Omegel needed = 225.6 uL

aprotinin = 4.8 uL

thrombin = 4.8 uL

fibrinogen = 32 uL

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02
